09b72.content:
Legacy Cline progress snapshot:
- Completed: PHive runtime and generator were rebuilt around PHiveType and PHiveField, payload serialization via %PVR%, reusable hook templates, and PHiveRouter with tested dynamic routing.
- Removed: PHiveConsumer and its adapter surfaces were retired in favor of the router layer.
- Pending roadmap: PHiveStaticRouter implementation, PHiveRef generator support, PHiveProcessor and PHiveDataSource, router-level scope configuration, and broader integration tests that combine router and hook behavior.
